title: Heart XP
body:
```
 ▄ .▄▄▄▄ . ▄▄▄· ▄▄▄  ▄▄▄▄▄    ▐▄• ▄  ▄▄▄·
██▪▐█▀▄.▀·▐█ ▀█ ▀▄ █·•██       █▌█▌▪▐█ ▄█
██▀▐█▐▀▀▪▄▄█▀▀█ ▐▀▀▄  ▐█.▪     ·██·  ██▀·
██▌▐▀▐█▄▄▌▐█ ▪▐▌▐█•█▌ ▐█▌·    ▪▐█·█▌▐█▪·•
▀▀▀ · ▀▀▀  ▀  ▀ .▀  ▀ ▀▀▀     •▀▀ ▀▀.▀   
```
This resource pack replaces the default XP orbs in Minecraft with **bright, glowing green hearts**, giving the game a cuter, magical, and more charming atmosphere.

---
![xp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3735663ffecf3f62b3efbf5d4fdd6aa1521b67e.gif)

---

###  Features
- XP appears as luminous green hearts   
- Easier to see in dark environments  
- Adorable and visually appealing style  
- Great for fantasy, RPG, kawaii, and cozy packs  

###  Compatibility
- Works on **Java Edition**  
- Compatible with other resource packs  
- Can be used alongside shaders  

###  Installation
1. Download the pack  
2. Drop it into the `resourcepacks` folder  
3. Enable it in the Minecraft settings  
4. Done! Start collecting glowing hearts!
